facilityCode.invalid: We can't find this facility code. Check the code and try again.

schoolName.maxLength: School name must be 100 characters or less

scoName.required: Enter the School Certifying Official's name
scoName.pattern: Name can only include letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens
scoName.maxLength: Name must be 50 characters or less

scoTitle.maxLength: Title must be 50 characters or less

studentFirstName.pattern: First name can only include letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens
studentFirstName.maxLength: First name must be 35 characters or less

studentLastName.pattern: Last name can only include letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens
studentLastName.maxLength: Last name must be 35 characters or less

ssn.required: Enter the student's Social Security number
ssn.pattern: Enter a valid 9-digit Social Security number

dateOfBirth.required: Enter the student's date of birth
dateOfBirth.invalidDate: Enter a valid date of birth
dateOfBirth.futureDate: Date of birth can't be in the future
dateOfBirth.unreasonableDate: Enter a reasonable date of birth

programName.required: Enter the program of study or course name
programName.maxLength: Program name must be 100 characters or less

termBeginDate.invalidDate: Enter a valid term begin date
termBeginDate.unreasonableDate: Term begin date must be within one year

termEndDate.invalidDate: Enter a valid term end date
termEndDate.beforeBeginDate: Term end date must be after the begin date

creditHours.required: Enter the number of credit hours
creditHours.min: Credit hours must be at least 0.5
creditHours.max: Credit hours can't be more than 30
creditHours.pattern: Enter credit hours as a number (decimals allowed)

trainingHours.min: Training hours must be at least 1
trainingHours.max: Training hours can't be more than 40
trainingHours.pattern: Enter training hours as a whole number

programType.required: Select the type of training program

trainingLocation.required: Select where the training takes place

zipCode.required: Enter the ZIP code of the training location

effectiveDate.required: Enter the effective date of the change

changeReason.required: Enter the reason for the change or withdrawal
changeReason.maxLength: Reason must be 500 characters or less

certificationAttestation.required: You must certify that the information is true and correct

crossFieldValidation.termDates: Term end date must be after the begin date
crossFieldValidation.effectiveDateRange: Effective date must be within the term dates
crossFieldValidation.creditHoursStatus: Credit hours don't match the selected enrollment status
crossFieldValidation.trainingHoursStatus: Training hours don't match the selected enrollment status

submission.networkError: We're sorry. Something went wrong when we tried to submit your form. Please try again in a few minutes.
submission.validationError: We found some problems with your form. Please review and fix the highlighted fields.
submission.serverError: We're sorry. We're having technical difficulties right now. Please try submitting your form again in a few minutes.
submission.duplicateSubmission: This enrollment certification has already been submitted. If you need to make changes, submit a new form and select 'Enrollment change.'
submission.unauthorizedFacility: You're not authorized to submit certifications for this facility. Contact your Education Liaison Representative for help.
submission.maintenanceMode: The enrollment certification system is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again later or submit a paper form if urgent.

saveInProgress.saveError: We couldn't save your form right now. Please try again.
saveInProgress.loadError: We couldn't load your saved form. Please start over or contact support if this problem continues.
saveInProgress.expiredForm: Your saved form has expired. Please start a new form.

fileUpload.fileType: File must be a PDF, JPG, or PNG
fileUpload.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload your file. Please try again.
fileUpload.virusScan: We couldn't upload your file because it may contain a virus. Please scan your file and try again.
